candidate_llm_application: LLM safety-spell co-evolution: each system-prompt rule counters a specific jailbreak; the safety-spell catalog co-evolves with attack catalog.

results.title: Jailbreak Red-Teaming / Safety System-Prompt Design: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on jailbreak red-teaming / safety system-prompt design, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
